blog.title: Can quantum physics generate institutions?
blog.description: An example where the quantum prisoner's dilemma hands you a ready-made institution — and the question whether quantum could help generate institutions for harder problems.

prevBlog.title: Focused cybersecurity for a small project
prevBlog.description: Using a lightweight threat model to focus security work on a small project — figuring out what's actually worth protecting, and which alerts to safely ignore.
